step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("what happens when tetrazolium chloride is applied to necrotic versus healthy myocardium")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

We are analyzing a case where a 68-year-old male suffered severe chest pain and died en route to the hospital. Autopsy revealed tetrazolium chloride staining of the heart — specifically asking what color the **myocardium** would display.
